evals.prompt: Is SaaSHunt worth submitting to for SEO backlinks? How does it compare to other directories?
evals.expected_output: Explains SaaSHunt offers a free dofollow backlink at DR49, which is mid-range among directories. Compares with higher-DR alternatives and recommends as part of a broader submission sweep.

assertions.name: dr_value
assertions.description: States SaaSHunt has a dofollow backlink around DR49 and explains this is mid-range compared to other directories

assertions.name: comparison
assertions.description: Compares with at least one higher-DR directory like Uneed, Fazier, or Product Hunt to provide context on where SaaSHunt ranks

assertions.name: traffic_reality
assertions.description: Notes that SaaSHunt has very low traffic and positions the value primarily as a backlink play rather than a traffic or lead generation source

evals.prompt: How do I submit my product to SaaSHunt and what's the process?
evals.expected_output: Walks through the template-based submission process including downloading the Excel template, filling it out, and uploading via the web form.

assertions.name: template_process
assertions.description: Describes the template-based submission — downloading an Excel template, filling it out offline, and uploading it, which is different from typical online form submissions

assertions.name: required_info
assertions.description: Mentions the key information needed including product details, category selection, and contact information

assertions.name: categories
assertions.description: References the limited category structure covering business software categories like HR, CRM, Accounting, ERP, Marketing, or Project Management

evals.prompt: Where does SaaSHunt fit in a multi-directory launch strategy?
evals.expected_output: Places SaaSHunt in Phase 3 (free editorial queues) alongside other slow-review directories. Recommends submitting as a set-and-forget play for cumulative backlink value.

assertions.name: phase_placement
assertions.description: Places SaaSHunt in the free editorial queue phase rather than instant-listing or paid fast-track phases

assertions.name: submit_early
assertions.description: Recommends submitting early alongside other free-queue directories since the review timeline is unclear and it runs in parallel

assertions.name: realistic_expectations
assertions.description: Sets realistic expectations about very low traffic and positions the DR49 backlink as mid-range cumulative value in a broader directory strategy
